2022-23 Air Force Falcons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 14-18 (5-13, 10th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Joe Scott

PS/G: 66.9 (301st of 363)

PA/G: 67.1 (86th of 363)

SRS: 2.00 (129th of 363)

SOS: 2.12 (109th of 363)

ORtg: 104.0 (191st of 363)

DRtg: 104.2 (238th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
